title: Architecture: Recursive KPI Hierarchy
description: Migrate to a single recursive nodes table to allow unlimited nesting of indicators.
verification_method: Verify kpi_nodes table and successful CTE-based data retrieval.

title: UI: Plants Tab Modernization
description: Implement Master-Detail layout for plant management with visual color indicators.
verification_method: Manual UI check of the Plants explorer.

title: UI: Data Management Refactor
description: Simplify backup/restore and add explicit user-triggered CSV export.
verification_method: Verify CSV files are only generated when Export button is clicked.

title: UI: Results Analysis Simplification
description: Modernize Results tab with sidebar KPI selection and consolidated filters.
verification_method: Manual verification of tree-based KPI navigation in Results tab.

title: Target Entry: Input Stabilization
description: Switch entry fields to FocusOut validation to prevent mid-keystroke UI jumps.
verification_method: Manual data entry test to confirm smooth typing experience.
